[
  {
    "idea": "Weekly surge in Google Trends for sudden appliance breakdowns signals discretionary sector rebound",
    "family": "consumer_stress",
    "data": {
      "source": "Google Trends weekly search interest for appliance repair keywords",
      "type": "api",
      "frequency": "weekly",
      "stable": true
    },
    "behavior": "A sharp weekly increase in searches related to emergency appliance repairs often precedes increased consumer spending on home services and replacements.",
    "market_impact": {
      "direction": "bullish",
      "sector": "XLY",
      "rationale": "Discretionary retailers and home improvement benefit as consumers rush to replace or fix broken appliances."
    },
    "trade_logic": {
      "entry": "Enter long XLY when weekly Google Trends for appliance breakdown-related terms rises over 20% from the prior week",
      "exit": "Exit after 4 weeks or when search volume returns to baseline",
      "expected_frequency": "medium"
    },
    "expected_fire_rate": "weekly",
    "historical_backfill": true,
    "minimum_history_months": 18,
    "adapter_status": "existing",
    "trigger_sensitivity": "high",
    "reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days": "Weekly Google Trends data for appliance repair spikes frequently during seasonal appliance wear periods."
  },

    "trigger_sensitivity": "medium",

  },
